title: firrtl backend test.sh fail with "No top module found"
body:
@azidar @cliffordwolf 

I ran `test.sh` in backends/firrtl before attempting to look at @492.

The test fails with the following signature:

    $ ./test.sh 
    + cd ../../
    + make
    [Makefile.conf] CONFIG := gcc
    
      Build successful.
    
    + cd backends/firrtl
    + ../../yosys -q -p 'prep -nordff; write_firrtl test.fir'
    ERROR: No top module found!

In the interest of working on a clean code base, can either review why the above test case is failing?
